title: Professional Experience
subtitle: Proven track record in safety management and workplace safety implementation

experiences.title: Safety Officer
responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive risk assessments for construction sites and industrial facilities
Develop and implement safety protocols and procedures in compliance with local regulations
Provide safety training and induction programs for new employees and contractors
Investigate incidents and near-misses, preparing detailed reports and corrective action plans
Perform regular safety audits and inspections to ensure compliance with safety standards
Coordinate with management to establish safety policies and emergency response procedures

experiences.title: Assistant Safety Officer
responsibilities: Assisted in conducting safety inspections and risk assessments
Maintained safety documentation and incident reporting systems
Supported safety training programs and toolbox talks
Monitored compliance with personal protective equipment (PPE) requirements
Participated in safety committee meetings and contributed to safety improvement initiatives
Helped coordinate emergency drills and evacuation procedures
